description: In-app statistics and aggregates (flashcards, notes, learning path, app telemetry): list schemas, query keys, read/write/delete statistic records. Large tool surface—injected only when needed.
detection_hint: statistics, stats, analytics, aggregates, telemetry, totals, streak, how many reviewed, metrics, dashboard

injection.system_prompt_fragment: Analytics: typed statistic records at namespace/kind/key. Prefer stats_list_schemas before writes; stats_query to enumerate keys; stats_get_record or stats_read_fields for values. Writes validate against registered schemas when present.
